name: 高府厢房
description: 略显凌乱的待客厢房。原本整洁的床铺被扯乱，桌椅有被碰撞的痕迹。地上散落着被撕扯的衣物。黄昏的光线让房间显得昏暗且充满阴谋的气息。
visual_reference: Interior of a guest wing room in an ancient Chinese manor. Messy unmade bed, overturned chairs, torn ancient clothing scattered on the floor. Dusk lighting casting long shadows, conveying a sense of chaos and conspiracy. Cinematic, dramatic lighting, 8k.
lighting: 黄昏的暗光，光线不足，角落充满阴影，凸显场景的混乱与压抑。
emotional_range: 从震惊愤怒、怒扇耳光到动胎气早产的彻底失控。
